properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Marvelous message we bring Glorious carol we sing Wonderful word of the King Jesus is coming again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Coming again, coming again Maybe morning, maybe noon, Maybe evening and maybe soon Coming again, coming again Oh what a wonderful day it will be Jesus is coming again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Forest and flower exclaim Mountain and meadow the same All earth and heaven proclaim Jesus is coming again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Standing before Him at last Trial and trouble all past Crowns at His feet we will cast Jesus is coming again
